div1.entryFree: Warranty, authorization, allowance, permission: from your love I have a w. to unburden all my plots and purposes, Merch. I, 1, 132. her obsequies have been as far enlarged as we have w. Hml. V, 1, 250 (F1 warrantise). never loved Cassio but with such general w. of heaven as I might love, Oth. V, 2, 60.
